data.body: 9597 test contract card: authoritative_contract=ticket AC: pyproject metrics extra is lizard>=1.23, scc/jscpd remain external, lizard is loaded only through guard_import(extra=metrics), and absence becomes registry.Unavailable naming the extra; trigger_preconditions=real lizard module present for happy control / OptionalDependencyError raised at guard boundary for missing-extra case / clean subprocess import with lizard blocked; production_path=public analyzer.load_lizard boundary plus import rebar.metrics.analyzer; test_tier=in-process unit for packaging/import mapping and typed fallback, clean subprocess for module-scope optionality (one tier lower cannot prove import cleanliness); observable_postcondition=present module returned unchanged, missing module returns exact Unavailable with preserved accruing_since and metrics install guidance, package imports without loading lizard; negative_control=present module path; ci_gate=make test (focused tests first).
